headline: Mon Power and Potomac Edison Request Rate Review, Proposing Two Paths to Support Reliability Investments
summary: Mon Power and Potomac Edison, subsidiaries of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE), have asked the Public Service Commission of West Virginia (PSC) to review electric rates so the companies can keep investing in a safe, reliable electric system that is better prepared for severe weather, while keeping costs in mind.
